items.title: Norwegian Landscapes
items.description: A selection of mountain and coastal scenes from Norway.

items.title: Mountain Landscape
items.description: A view of alpine mountains and late afternoon light. Shot in the Norwegian highlands.

items.title: Urban Architecture
items.description: Modern cityscape and building facades. Exploring rhythm and repetition in the built environment.

items.title: Portrait — Freckles
items.description: Close-up portrait in natural light. Part of a series on skin and texture.

items.title: Still Life — Table
items.description: Everyday objects arranged on a table. Soft shadows and warm tones.

items.title: Urban Frames
items.description: Architecture and street photography from city explorations.

items.title: Street — Oslo
items.description: Street photography in central Oslo. Moments and passers-by in winter light.

items.title: Coast — West Norway
items.description: Rocky coastline and sea. Long exposure and neutral density filters.
